tooltips.nome: Commercial name of the supply for identification
tooltips.tipo: Category of the supply. Medication: pharmaceutical products. Cosmetic: beauty products. Material: disposable materials. Other: other types.
tooltips.apresentacao: Pharmaceutical form or presentation of the product (ampoule, vial, syringe, etc.)
tooltips.unidadeAquisicao: Unit of purchase from the supplier (unit, box, package, kit)
tooltips.quantidadePorUnidade: Quantity of individual units per acquisition unit. Ex: 4 ampoules per box.
tooltips.unidadeDosagem: Unit of measurement for dosage (mg, mL, IU, mcg)
tooltips.volumeTotal: Total volume in milliliters (mL) per individual unit
tooltips.dosagemTotal: Total dosage per individual unit in the informed dosage unit
tooltips.concentracao: Concentration calculated automatically: Total Dosage ÷ Total Volume
tooltips.estoqueMinimo: Minimum quantity in stock for replenishment alert
tooltips.fornecedorPrincipal: Name of the primary supplier of this supply
tooltips.requerReceituario: Check if this supply requires a medical prescription for dispensing
tooltips.ativo: Uncheck to deactivate this supply without deleting it
